title: Odds & Ends
description: An assortment of random tweaks and features added to Minecraft.
body:
A mod containing random tweaks and additions to Minecraft. Formerly known as **RedPack Utils.**

## **Features**
A full list of features can be seen on the [GitHub Wiki!](https://github.com/RedCraft86/OddsAndEnds/wiki)

## **Modpack Usage**
You may include this mod into your own modpacks as long as it is distributed through CurseForge, Modrinth, or any other recognized mainstream modding platforms that may exist in the future.

## **Developers**
More info for developers such as dependence, forks, and modifications on GitHub.
